steps.text: Upgrading the vendored jsonfmt dependency from v1 to v2 (breaking change) and bumping deps.lock.json.

args.command: grep -q '"jsonfmt": "2.0.0"' deps.lock.json && ! grep -q '1.0.0' deps.lock.json && node -e "const j=require('./vendor/jsonfmt'); process.exit(j.version==='2.0.0' && j.format({x:1},{pretty:false})==='{\"x\":1}' ? 0 : 1)"

steps.done: vendor/jsonfmt/index.js now ships v2 (breaking format(obj, opts)); deps.lock.json bumped to 2.0.0.
